description_long: This mosque features a grand central dome flanked by several smaller domes, all set atop a rectangular main prayer hall. Four tall, slender minarets with multiple balconies rise from each corner of the main structure, each topped with a pointed finial. The mosque is approached by a large courtyard with a central ablution fountain, surrounded by green lawns and paved walkways. The exterior is primarily white and gray, with dark accents at the base of the minarets and around the windows and doors. The architectural design is symmetrical, with arched entrances and windows, and the domes are smooth and unadorned. The overall layout and elements suggest a style reminiscent of grand Ottoman mosques.
description: A large, symmetrical mosque with a central dome, four tall minarets, and a spacious courtyard featuring an ablution fountain. The structure is primarily white and gray with dark accents and green landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central dome, four minarets, and the courtyard with the ablution fountain.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated rectangular layout, the height of the minarets, and the domes' arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the main dome, smaller domes, and the symmetry of the minarets.
description_view_3: Angled side-rear view showing the relationship between the mosque, courtyard, and the placement of minarets.
attribute_dome: Multiple domes are visible: one large central dome and several smaller domes, all smooth and hemispherical, placed symmetrically atop the main structure and side wings, with no visible decorative patterns.
attribute_minaret: Four tall, slender minarets with multiple balconies, each positioned at a corner of the mosque, rising significantly above the main dome and topped with pointed finials.
attribute_islamic_geometric_patterns: None visible; the surfaces appear smooth and unadorned by geometric patterns.
attribute_arabic_calligraphy: None visible; no calligraphy is apparent on domes, entrances, or panels.
attribute_architectural_style: Ottoman style, characterized by a large central dome, multiple smaller domes, four tall minarets with balconies, and a symmetrical courtyard layout.
